_comment: Allowlist of license-cleared generator voice models. `generate` only uses models listed here unless --allow-unverified is passed. Each entry is diligence done ONCE, then enforced forever by the ship gate. Adding a model means you have read its license (and, for trained models, its training-data license) and confirmed commercial + redistributable rights.

models.notes: PLACEHOLDER — replace with a real verified CC0 Piper voice. CC0 voices exist (public-domain dedication, no strings). Confirm the MODEL_CARD says CC0 and the training dataset is also unrestricted before shipping.
